regulatory_context.value: Healthcare service providers must prove necessary language skills, and medical practitioners can use B2/INLL proof routes in Luxembourg.

training_support_route.value: Luxembourg company-training co-funding exists at 15%, with a 35% wage-cost uplift for qualifying participants.

target_audience_summary.value: Healthcare employers and frontline staff in Luxembourg who need practical Luxembourgish for patient-facing work.
target_audience_summary.omission_reason: Useful synthesis, but still partly inferential and not safe as default dashboard truth.

market_evidence_summary.omission_reason: Derived SEMrush market-evidence layer for prioritization and further research. Keep it out of customer-facing copy until translated into route-safe product language.
